luke-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
notes: 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
luke-stand-light-punch.notes_sc: Long range for a cancelable light normal, good whiff punish tool; 3f extra recovery on whiff; greatly extends hurtbox for 3f before active, making it susceptible to counterpokes; special/DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

luke-stand-medium-punch.name: Standing Medium Punch
luke-stand-medium-punch.notes_sc: Good whiff punish tool when buffered into Target Combo or Super

luke-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
luke-stand-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Good whiff punish tool due to its long range and cancelability; extends a vertical collision box to reduce the risk of whiffing under opponent mid-juggle

luke-stand-light-kick.name: Standing Light Kick
luke-stand-light-kick.notes_sc: DR cancel is delayed until after 1st recovery frame

luke-stand-medium-kick.name: Standing Medium Kick
notes: 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
luke-stand-medium-kick.notes_sc: Good neutral poke; 3f extra recovery on whiff; lifts up leg hurtbox on frames 4-11, making it strong vs. low attacks

luke-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
Feet are Invincible from frame 8 to frame 15
luke-stand-heavy-kick.notes_sc: 8-15f Low Crush (feet are strike invincible); puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; Punish Counter launches opponent high into a limited juggle state; can be spaced for significantly better advantage; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles; first 2 active frames have shorter range (makes it easier to space properly); causes camera shake effect on block when connecting with final active frame (easier to tell when Luke has advantage)

luke-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
luke-crouch-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 2LP/2LK; Luke's only 4f normal, useful in 3-hit light confirms; DR cancel is delayed until after 1st recovery frame; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-5 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)

luke-crouch-medium-punch.name: Crouching Medium Punch
notes: 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
luke-crouch-medium-punch.notes_sc: 3f extra recovery on whiff; great pressure tool with high reward on counter-hit or when canceled to Drive Rush; has an extended hurtbox on whiff until the end of recovery; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-7 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)

luke-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: Forces the opponent into a standing position
This move can be canceled until the 1st active frame
luke-crouch-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Forces stand on hit; only the first active frame is cancelable; good anti-air hitbox but cannot hit cross-ups

luke-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled

luke-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
luke-crouch-medium-kick.notes_sc: Moves Luke forward, greatly increasing its range despite the stubby-looking animation; Range: 1.482 (1st active frame: 1.44); DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; has an extended hurtbox on whiff until the end of recovery

luke-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

luke-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
luke-jump-medium-punch.notes_sc: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; has some juggle potential; can significantly delay the cancel into j.214P, allowing unique combos after pf.214[LP]; lower body projectile invuln 9-22f (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

luke-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent
luke-jump-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Spike knockdown on counter-hit/Punish Counter vs. airborne opponents; good close range jump-in and neutral jump throw bait tool; lower body projectile invuln 9-23f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

luke-jump-light-kick.name: Jumping Light Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties

luke-jump-medium-kick.name: Jumping Medium Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties
luke-jump-medium-kick.notes_sc: Cross-up; lower body projectile invuln 7-20f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

luke-jump-heavy-kick.name: Jumping Heavy Kick
luke-jump-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Better horizontal range than j.HP for long-range jumps; lower body projectile invuln 10-19f except around attack hitbox, and 10-24f for lowest part of foot hurtbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

rawhide.name: Rawhide
notes: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching
Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
rawhide.notes_sc: Causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; has some juggle potential

suppressor.name: Suppressor
notes: A strike unleashed after stepping backward. Can be canceled into special moves
suppressor.notes_sc: Pulls back hurtbox frames 5-12 for an auto-shimmy tool (also very strong when used out of Drive Rush)

outlaw-kick.name: Outlaw Kick
notes: A powerful anti-air high kick
17 frames of advantage added when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
outlaw-kick.notes_sc: Whiffs on crouching opponents at farther ranges unless they extend a vertical hurtbox; puts airborne opponents into spinning limited juggle state; no head hurtbox during active frames, making it a useful anti-air; after DR~4HK on block, Luke is at the edge of throw range and can also threaten with 2LK~2LP to punish walk back, or 2LP to beat reversal 4f normals; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

double-impact-1.name: Double Impact (1)
notes: A series of attacks performed while moving forward. The second attack can be canceled into special moves
4 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

double-impact-2.name: Double Impact (2)
notes: A series of attacks performed while moving forward. The second attack can be canceled into special moves

triple-impact-2.name: Triple Impact (2)
notes: A quick series of attacks that can be canceled into special moves

triple-impact-3.name: Triple Impact (3)
notes: A quick series of attacks that can be canceled into special moves

nose-breaker.name: Nose Breaker
notes: An attack consisting of multiple hits, the first of which cannot be blocked while standing

snapback-combo-2.name: Snapback Combo (2)
snapback-combo-2.name_ja: スナップバックコンボ (2)
notes: A series of attacks, the first and second of which can be canceled into Super Arts

snapback-combo-3.name: Snapback Combo (3)
snapback-combo-3.name_ja: スナップバックコンボ (3)
notes: A series of attacks, the first and second of which can be canceled into Super Arts

snapback-combo-4.name: Snapback Combo (4)
snapback-combo-4.name_ja: スナップバックコンボ (4)
notes: A series of attacks, the first and second of which can be canceled into Super Arts

sand-blast-light.name: Sand Blast (Light)
notes: Fire a shockwave of pressure from your fist. Useful for checking an opponent from a distance, and as a stopgap in combos

sand-blast-medium.name: Sand Blast (Medium)
notes: Fire a shockwave of pressure from your fist. Useful for checking an opponent from a distance, and as a stopgap in combos

sand-blast-heavy.name: Sand Blast (Heavy)
notes: Fire a shockwave of pressure from your fist. Useful for checking an opponent from a distance, and as a stopgap in combos

sand-blast-od.name: Sand Blast (OD)
notes: Fire a shockwave of pressure from your fist. Useful for checking an opponent from a distance, and as a stopgap in combos

fatal-shot.name: Fatal Shot
notes: After an od sand blast
Fire an additional shockwave after an OD Sand Blast. Useful for securing some damage after trading projectiles
Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation
fatal-shot.notes_sc: 1-hit OD projectile; costs 1 extra Drive bar; () refers to scaled damage after 236PP connects; causes a wallsplat on hit (can combo near the corner, or whiff 236K~P to safely gain ground); extends a projectile invuln hurtbox on frames 10-32 (more vulnerable to ranged jumps and anti-projectile moves)

flash-knuckle-light.name: Flash Knuckle (Light)
flash-knuckle-light.name_ja: フラッシュナックル (弱)
notes: A full powered, chargeable punch. Increase the damage output by holding down the button at the beginning. Release the button when you see a flash to further boost its properties
Hold the button for more than 18 frames to change properties
Perform the Perfect version by releasing the button between frames 18 - 20

charged-flash-knuckle-light.name: Charged Flash Knuckle (Light)
charged-flash-knuckle-light.name_ja: フラッシュナックル（弱）（ホールド）
notes: A full powered, chargeable punch. Increase the damage output by holding down the button at the beginning. Release the button when you see a flash to further boost its properties
Has a clash hitbox from frame 28 to frame 29
Combo scaling added to 2nd hit

perfect-flash-knuckle-light.name: Perfect Flash Knuckle (Light)
perfect-flash-knuckle-light.name_ja: フラッシュナックル（弱）（ジャスト）
notes: A Flash Knuckle performed while jumping. Can be used to alter the trajectory of your jump, making it useful for surprise attacks. Can also be worked into aerial combos
Has a clash hitbox from frame 28 to frame 29
Combo scaling added to 2nd hit

flash-knuckle-medium.name: Flash Knuckle (Medium)
flash-knuckle-medium.name_ja: フラッシュナックル (中)
notes: A full powered, chargeable punch. Increase the damage output by holding down the button at the beginning. Release the button when you see a flash to further boost its properties
Hold the button for more than 18 frames to change properties
Perform the Perfect version by releasing the button between frames 18 - 20

charged-flash-knuckle-medium.name: Charged Flash Knuckle (Medium)
charged-flash-knuckle-medium.name_ja: フラッシュナックル（中）（ホールド）
notes: A full powered, chargeable punch. Increase the damage output by holding down the button at the beginning. Release the button when you see a flash to further boost its properties
Has a clash hitbox from frame 32 to frame 33
Combo scaling added to 2nd hit
Recovery reduced by 4 frames on super armor hit

perfect-flash-knuckle-medium.name: Perfect Flash Knuckle (Medium)
perfect-flash-knuckle-medium.name_ja: フラッシュナックル（中）（ジャスト）
notes: A Flash Knuckle performed while jumping. Can be used to alter the trajectory of your jump, making it useful for surprise attacks. Can also be worked into aerial combos
Has a clash hitbox from frame 31 to frame 32
Combo scaling added to 2nd hit

flash-knuckle-heavy.name: Flash Knuckle (Heavy)
flash-knuckle-heavy.name_ja: フラッシュナックル (強)
notes: A full powered, chargeable punch. Increase the damage output by holding down the button at the beginning. Release the button when you see a flash to further boost its properties
Hold the button for more than 18 frames to change properties
Perform the Perfect version by releasing the button between frames 18 - 20

charged-flash-knuckle-heavy.name: Charged Flash Knuckle (Heavy)
charged-flash-knuckle-heavy.name_ja: フラッシュナックル（強）（ホールド）
notes: A full powered, chargeable punch. Increase the damage output by holding down the button at the beginning. Release the button when you see a flash to further boost its properties
Has a clash hitbox from frame 35 to frame 36

perfect-flash-knuckle-heavy.name: Perfect Flash Knuckle (Heavy)
perfect-flash-knuckle-heavy.name_ja: フラッシュナックル（強）（ジャスト）
notes: A Flash Knuckle performed while jumping. Can be used to alter the trajectory of your jump, making it useful for surprise attacks. Can also be worked into aerial combos
Has a clash hitbox from frame 35 to frame 36

flash-knuckle-od.name: Flash Knuckle (OD)
notes: A full powered, chargeable punch. Increase the damage output by holding down the button at the beginning. Release the button when you see a flash to further boost its properties
Transitions to 2nd attack on hit
Can only be canceled into DDT on the 1st hit

flash-knuckle-od-2.name: Flash Knuckle (OD) (2)
notes: A full powered, chargeable punch. Increase the damage output by holding down the button at the beginning. Release the button when you see a flash to further boost its properties

luke-ddt.name: DDT
notes: After an Flash Knuckle OD
A powerful throw activated from the first hit of an OD Flash Knuckle. Useful for when you want to guarantee some extra damage
Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation
luke-ddt.notes_sc: Costs 1 extra Drive bar on 214PP 1st hit only (cannot activate on block or when armor absorbed); leaves Luke close enough to walk in for a strike/throw mixup; counts as a separate hit from 214PP for damage scaling; in juggles, only connects on opponents low to the ground and will not come out if opponent is juggled higher

aerial-flash-knuckle.name: Aerial Flash Knuckle
aerial-flash-knuckle.name_ja: エアフラッシュナックル
notes: A Flash Knuckle performed while jumping. Can be used to alter the trajectory of your jump, making it useful for surprise attacks. Can also be worked into aerial combos
+7 frames of recovery added when whiffing the attack high in the air.
aerial-flash-knuckle.notes_sc: Can be input during forward/neutral jump (or back jump when canceled from j.MP); the final 12 recovery frames are in a crouching state; puts the opponent into a limited juggle state; kara-canceling the startup with j.214P~PP can affect Luke's trajectory and frame advantage

aerial-flash-knuckle-charged.name: Aerial Flash Knuckle (Charged)
aerial-flash-knuckle-charged.name_ja: エアフラッシュナックル (溜め)
notes: A Flash Knuckle performed while jumping. Can be used to alter the trajectory of your jump, making it useful for surprise attacks. Can also be worked into aerial combos

aerial-flash-knuckle-od.name: Aerial Flash Knuckle (OD)
aerial-flash-knuckle-od.name_ja: エアフラッシュナックル (OD)
notes: A Flash Knuckle performed while jumping. Can be used to alter the trajectory of your jump, making it useful for surprise attacks. Can also be worked into aerial combos

avenger.name: Avenger
notes: Charge ahead in a forward-leaning stance. Other moves can be executed out of Avenger by pressing a button during its animation
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 13 - 31
avenger.notes_sc: Armor does not apply to follow-up attacks; follow-up P or K can be input up to frame 32; follow-up can start immediately after armor hit freeze without waiting for any additional Avenger startup frames to occur; Luke is in a Punish Counter state for entire duration

no-chaser.name: No Chaser
notes: During Avenger
A powerful tackle that can be executed during Avenger. This attack is active for a while, making it a useful tool for closing in on your opponent
no-chaser.notes_sc: Puts opponent into limited juggle state; very late connect to juggle into 623LP/MP, SA1, or SA2 (otherwise, can only cancel into SA3)

avenger-od.name: Avenger (OD)
notes: During Avenger OD
Charge ahead in a forward-leaning stance. Other moves can be executed out of Avenger by pressing a button during its animation
Super Armor for 1 attack from frames 3 - 35
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 12 - 31

impaler.name: Impaler
notes: During Avenger
An overhead kick that can be executed during Avenger and cannot be blocked while crouching. Useful when trying to sneak through an opponent's guard, or as part of a combo
5 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
impaler.notes_sc: First 2 active frames can only hit airborne opponents; 3rd active frame hits grounded and gives the best KD Advantage (cannot hit meaty to allow a follow-up juggle); Luke is in a crouching state for entire recovery duration; puts opponents into limited juggle state; 5f extra recovery on whiff

no-chaser-od.name: No Chaser (OD)
notes: During Avenger OD
A powerful tackle that can be executed during Avenger. This attack is active for a while, making it a useful tool for closing in on your opponent

impaler-od.name: Impaler (OD)
notes: An overhead kick that can be executed during Avenger and cannot be blocked while crouching. Useful when trying to sneak through an opponent's guard, or as part of a combo

rising-uppercut-light.name: Rising Uppercut (Light)
rising-uppercut-light.name_ja: ライジングアッパー (弱)
notes: Unleash a ferocious punch as you leap diagonally upwards. It grants immunity to jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air technique
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 36
Does 800 individual damage from the 3rd active frame and on

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14

rising-uppercut-medium.name: Rising Uppercut (Medium)
rising-uppercut-medium.name_ja: ライジングアッパー (中)
notes: Unleash a ferocious punch as you leap diagonally upwards. It grants immunity to jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air technique
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8
Considered airborne from frames 9 - 39
Does 800 individual damage from the 3rd active frame and on

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8

rising-uppercut-heavy.name: Rising Uppercut (Heavy)
rising-uppercut-heavy.name_ja: ライジングアッパー (強)
notes: Unleash a ferocious punch as you leap diagonally upwards. It grants immunity to jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air technique
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9
Considered airborne from frames 11 - 43
Does 800 individual damage from the 3rd active frame and on

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9

rising-uppercut-od.name: Rising Uppercut (OD)
notes: Unleash a ferocious punch as you leap diagonally upwards. It grants immunity to jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air technique
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 10
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 50
Can only transition to Slam Dunk on hit

slam-dunk.name: Slam Dunk
notes: After a Rising Uppercut OD
An attack executed from an OD Rising Uppercut that slams an opponent to the ground. In addition to its high damage, it leaves you in an advantageous position afterward
Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation
slam-dunk.notes_sc: Follow-up on hit only for 1 additional Drive bar; can whiff against high juggled opponent; counts as a separate hit for damage scaling

vulcan-blast.name: Vulcan Blast
notes: Fire multiple high-speed Sand Blasts. Its swift speed makes it useful in projectile wars and in combos
Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 6
Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 6

vulcan-blast.notes_sc: 5 hit Super projectile, first 4 hits travel 65% screen, final hit goes fullscreen; higher KD Adv. when farther from wall; extends a projectile-vulnerable hurtbox during startup frames 2-5 (more difficult to use as an anti-fireball tool)

eraser.name: Eraser
notes: A series of punches punctuated by a powerful finishing blow that sends an opponent flying. Connecting with the first hit is enough to activate the combination attack that follows
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 7
Transitions to full attack after the 2nd hit
Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
eraser.notes_sc: Extremely fast super that works well in juggles; in the corner, gives Luke an auto-timed strike/throw mixup; on hit, the animation is not invincible until the very end (can be hit by delayed projectiles like Kimberly Spraycan or JP Amnesia orbs); Full Dmg distribution: 300x3,200x6,700

pale-rider.name: Pale Rider
notes: Charge and mount the opponent before unloading a flurry of powerful punches. It has long forward range, making it useful in combos, or as a way to deal with projectiles
Start up changes depending on the distance from the opponent
When activated from close range
Start up is 10 frames, and completely invincible from frames 1 - 13
When activated from furthest possible range
Start up is 27 frames, and completely invincible from frames 1 - 13
Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Can only be canceled into from special moves

invuln.full: Start up is 27 frames, and completely invincible from frames 1 - 13

pale-rider.notes_sc: Luke runs forward; active frames occur upon reaching the opponent or on frame 27 (whichever occurs first) but invincibility is not extended when far from opponent; has juggle potential; on block, bounces away with a fixed recovery period (whiff recovery is 26f slower); cinematic time regenerates ~2 Drive bars for Luke; takes opponent to Memphis

pale-rider-ca.name: Pale Rider (Critical Art)
notes: When under 25% vitality
Start up changes depending on the distance from the opponent
When activated from close range
Start up is 10 frames, and completely invincible from frames 1 - 13
When activated from furthest possible range
Start up is 27 frames, and completely invincible from frames 1 - 13
Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Can only be canceled into from special moves

invuln.full: Start up is 27 frames, and completely invincible from frames 1 - 13

sweeper.name: Sweeper
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent, lift them up, and slam them onto their back. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
sweeper.notes_sc: Has access to corner throw loop, requires walking with manual timing (4f timing leniency to beat reversal 4f buttons); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

scrapper.name: Scrapper
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent's head and send them flying with two knee strikes. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
scrapper.notes_sc: Side switches; no throw oki after back throwing opponent into corner, but can threaten with meaty strikes; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
